_meta.purpose: Extension E hand-curated Open Dental mapping. Consumed by praxis_deid/extractors/e_*.py to produce timekeeping_raw.csv at de-id time. Derived from expected_mapping_open_dental.json + expert audit. DO NOT regenerate from the wizard — the wizard's output is 78% reliable per the Wizard-1 validation gate (commit 6b19ae9). Hand-edits to this file MUST cite the Open Dental manual page they are based on.

staff_role.notes: Open Dental does not store non-provider staff roles in the PMS. Staff timekeeping typically lives in payroll software (Gusto, ADP, etc.); recommend an integration there for role-grain rows.

scheduled_hours.notes: Hours scheduled. Same source as Extension C but different grain.

productive_hours.source_expression: (SELECT SUM(appointment.AptLength) / 60.0 FROM appointment WHERE appointment.ProvNum = schedule.ProvNum AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) = schedule.SchedDate AND appointment.AptStatus = 2)
productive_hours.notes: Same as Extension C productive_hours. AptLength units may need verification per install.

hourly_rate.notes: provider.HourlyRate is populated only when practices use Open Dental's payroll module — many do not. Operator should verify before relying on this column.

notes: Provider-grain only; staff-role grain unmappable from PMS alone.
